t.t-value: str(record.ks_rotate_angle) if record.ks_rotate_image and record.ks_rotate_angle else ''

div.t-att-style: 'opacity:' + str(record.ks_report_transparency) + '; transform: scale('+ str(record.ks_report_scale) + '); -webkit-transform: scale('+ str(record.ks_report_scale) + ');'
'opacity:' + str(record.ks_report_transparency) + '; transform: scale('+ str(record.ks_report_scale) + '); -webkit-transform: scale('+ str(record.ks_report_scale) + ');'
'opacity:' + str(record.ks_report_transparency) + '; transform: scale('+ str(record.ks_report_scale) + '); -webkit-transform: scale('+ str(record.ks_report_scale) + ');'
'transform:rotate(' + ks_rotate_angle + ' deg); -webkit-transform:rotate(' + ks_rotate_angle + 'deg);font-size: '+ ks_temp_font_size + 'px; color: '+ record.ks_font_color +';'
'opacity:' + str(record.ks_report_transparency) + '; transform: scale('+ str(record.ks_report_scale) + '); -webkit-transform: scale('+ str(record.ks_report_scale) + ');'
'transform:rotate(' + ks_rotate_angle + ' deg); -webkit-transform:rotate(' + ks_rotate_angle + 'deg);font-size: '+ ks_temp_font_size + 'px; color: '+ record.ks_font_color +';'
